name: AI Client Onboarding Agent for GoHighLevel: Tasks, Email, Drive and Slack with Claude

parameters.content:
## AI Client Onboarding Agent for GoHighLevel using Claude

The moment a deal is marked Won in GoHighLevel, this workflow kicks off the entire onboarding process automatically. Claude AI reads the service type and deal notes, writes a personalised welcome email, generates a custom 6-task onboarding plan for that specific client, and creates every task directly in GHL -- so your team opens GHL and the work is already laid out.

No static task templates. No manual emails. No copy-pasting client details. Every client gets a tailored onboarding in under 60 seconds.

### How it works

1. GoHighLevel fires a webhook the moment an opportunity stage changes to Won.
2. The Settings node extracts all deal and contact data from the GHL payload and holds your agency configuration.
3. Claude Sonnet reads the service purchased, deal value, and opportunity notes, then generates a personalised welcome email, a custom 6-task onboarding plan specific to that service, and a short internal client summary.
4. The workflow creates each of the 6 tasks directly in GHL via API, assigned to your account manager with due dates spaced across the first 30 days.
5. A new client folder is created in Google Drive named with the client and service.
6. The Claude-written welcome email is sent via Gmail with the Drive folder link included.
7. A kickoff call is scheduled in Google Calendar 2 business days from today.
8. Your team gets a Slack alert with the client name, service, deal value, first 3 tasks, and a Drive link.
9. The GHL contact is tagged as Onboarding Started and Active Client via API.
10. Everything is logged to Google Sheets with timestamp, client details, task count, drive link, and status.

### Setup steps

- [ ] **GHL webhook** -- In GHL go to Settings, Integrations, Webhooks and create a new webhook. Set the trigger to Opportunity Stage Changed and paste the URL from the Receive GHL Won Deal node. Activate this workflow first.
- [ ] **Settings node** -- Open Configure Settings and fill in your agency name, GHL API key, GHL Location ID, account manager name and user ID, Slack channel ID, Google Calendar ID, Google Drive parent folder ID, booking link, and log sheet ID.
- [ ] **Claude AI** -- Click the Claude Sonnet sub-node under Generate Onboarding Plan, add a new Anthropic credential from console.anthropic.com.
- [ ] **Gmail** -- Connect your Gmail account in Send Welcome Email.
- [ ] **Google Drive** -- Connect your Google account in Create Client Folder.
- [ ] **Google Calendar** -- Connect your Google account in Schedule Kickoff Call.
- [ ] **Slack** -- Connect your Slack account in Notify Team - New Client. Right-click and Disable if unused.
- [ ] **Google Sheets** -- Create a sheet called Onboarding Log with columns: Timestamp, Client Name, Client Email, Company, Service, Deal Value, Tasks Created, Drive Link, Kickoff Date, Status. Connect your Google account in Log Onboarding.
- [ ] Activate and mark a test deal as Won in GHL to verify the full pipeline runs.

### Customization

Edit the Claude prompt in Generate Onboarding Plan to list your specific service offerings so Claude generates the right tasks for each one. Add a second Claude call for high-value deals to also generate a 30-60-90 day success plan.

## Receive Won deal and configure

GHL fires a webhook when an opportunity is marked Won. The Settings node extracts all contact and deal data from the payload and holds your agency config -- edit only this node to personalise the entire workflow.

## Generate onboarding plan with Claude AI

Claude Sonnet reads the service type, deal value, and opportunity notes and returns three outputs in one API call: a personalised welcome email, a custom 6-task onboarding plan for this specific service, and a short internal client summary for Slack.

Edit the prompt in this node to list your actual service offerings so Claude generates the right tasks for each service type.

## Create 6 tasks in GoHighLevel

Parses Claude's task list and creates each of the 6 tasks in GHL via API, assigned to your account manager with staggered due dates across the first 30 days. No manual task creation ever again.

## Drive folder, welcome email and kickoff call

Creates a named client folder in Google Drive, sends the Claude-written welcome email via Gmail with the Drive link, and schedules a kickoff call in Google Calendar 2 business days from today.

## Alert team, tag GHL contact and log

Sends a Slack alert with client summary and first 3 tasks. Tags the GHL contact as Onboarding Started via API. Logs the full onboarding record to Google Sheets.

Slack is optional -- right-click Notify Team - New Client and Disable if unused.

additionalFields.description: ={{ 'Kickoff call with ' + $('Collect All Tasks').item.json.client_name + ' from ' + $('Collect All Tasks').item.json.client_company + '. Service: ' + $('Collect All Tasks').item.json.service_name }}

parameters.text:
={{ 'New client onboarded!

Client: ' + $("Collect All Tasks").item.json.client_name + '
Company: ' + $("Collect All Tasks").item.json.client_company + '
Service: ' + $("Collect All Tasks").item.json.service_name + '
Deal value: ' + $("Collect All Tasks").item.json.deal_value + '
Manager: ' + $("Collect All Tasks").item.json.account_manager + '

Summary: ' + $("Collect All Tasks").item.json.client_summary + '

First 3 tasks in GHL:
' + $("Collect All Tasks").item.json.task_summary + '

Kickoff scheduled. Drive folder created.' }}
